title: Generate Schema for Online Order Form
scenario: Write a GraphQL schema for an online order form. The form should have fields for customer name, address, phone number, and order items. Each order item should have fields for product name, quantity, and price. The schema should include types for Customer and OrderItem.
constraints: Must include the required fields for the Customer and OrderItem types

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the GraphQL schema is valid and correctly formatted.
Check if the schema correctly defines the Customer and OrderItem types.
Check if the schema correctly defines the fields for the Customer and OrderItem types.
